notes.pronunciation_hint: kshudhit pashan; keep the conjunct in ক্ষুধিত clear but not over-enunciated
Rabindranath Thakur; Bengali pronunciation, not Anglicized Tagore unless English context requires it
Aravalli; gently stress the middle syllable
Sekendra; preserve Tagore-era spelling and rhythm

normalization_policy: Keep original and normalized text side-by-side; do not rewrite literary diction destructively.
